objective: Engineers find and reuse what already exists instead of reinventing or asking around
strategic_priority: Reduce cognitive load and onboarding friction by making platform capabilities, components, and documentation discoverable and trustworthy

key_results.description: Frontend engineers find canonical components quickly instead of doing archaeology across three repos, measured by self-reported component discovery time dropping from 30 minutes to under 5 minutes per feature
key_results.unit: minutes (component discovery time per feature, self-reported)

key_results.description: New engineers ramp up using self-service resources instead of depending on a single senior engineer, measured by new-hire time to first merged PR dropping from 8 days to under 3 days
key_results.unit: days (new-hire time to first merged PR)

key_results.description: Engineers trust internal documentation enough to use it as their first resource, measured by developer portal satisfaction score in quarterly survey improving from baseline to 3.5+/5.0
